reason: To ensure that only users who are members of the wheel group can run commands with altered privileges through the su command, the line 'auth required pam_wheel.so use_uid' must be present in /etc/pam.d/su.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Missing pam_wheel.so use_uid line in /etc/pam.d/su; Users not in wheel group could gain unauthorized root access via su
